mapper.insert: insert into LiveActivitySessionTable(activityId, uId, pushToken, status, startedAt, expiresAt) values(#{activityId}, #{uId}, #{pushToken}, #{status}, #{startedAt}, #{expiresAt}) on duplicate key update uId = values(uId), pushToken = values(pushToken), status = values(status), expiresAt = values(expiresAt), updatedAt = current_timestamp
mapper.select: select * from LiveActivitySessionTable where status = 1 and (expiresAt is null or expiresAt > now())
